series_metadata.series_description: The Minutes of Official Public Meetings (e.g. findings of the Oversight Commission, Board of Directors, and Workers’ Compensation Council) provides an overview of the public meetings by listing the names of the participants, a written record of the minutes, orders, business, and policy decisions of BWC.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years, and then review by the State Archives before destroying. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years, and then review by the State Archives before destroying., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
